title: What are AI agents?
summary: Google Cloud Tech video demonstrates how to build autonomous multi-agent systems using the Google Agent Development Kit. The video covers ReAct framework theory, three agent patterns (sequential, reactive, planning), and includes a practical Python tutorial on building a self-correcting blog writing agent with validation and auto-retry capabilities.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video shows how to build autonomous multi-agent systems with the Google Agent Development Kit, pairing ReAct framework theory with a hands-on Python tutorial. It walks through three agent patterns: sequential, reactive, and planning, and uses SequentialAgent and agent hierarchy as building blocks. The practical example constructs a self-correcting blog writing agent that adds validation and auto-retry, so failed outputs trigger automatic correction rather than passing through unchecked.
